name: clawr-compiler
description: Prototype compiler for the Clawr language

scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun build src/rwrc/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/rwrc
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && bun test tests/unit
scripts.test:e2e: bun run build && bun test tests/unit && bun test tests/e2e
scripts.test:all: bun run test:runtime && bun run test:e2e && bun test tests/unit
